test_frameworks.name: pytest (shared)
test_frameworks.scope: Python DDL analysis tests in tests/unit/. Run via: cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest

test_frameworks.name: pytest (ddl-mcp)
test_frameworks.scope: MCP DDL server tests in plugin/mcp/ddl/tests/. Run via: cd plugin/mcp/ddl && uv run pytest

test_frameworks.name: promptfoo
test_frameworks.scope: LLM eval harness in tests/evals/. Run via: cd tests/evals && npm run eval

applications.name: ad-migration plugin
applications.description: DDL analysis and migration pipeline. Single unified plugin with commands and skills. Loaded via: claude --plugin-dir plugin/

plugin_manifest.description: Plugin manifest for the unified ad-migration plugin.

sandbox_backends.description: Technology-specific sandbox backends for test harness. base.py: abstract SandboxBackend interface. sql_server.py: pyodbc-based SQL Server sandbox lifecycle (schema cloning via SELECT INTO, proc cloning via OBJECT_DEFINITION, scenario execution). oracle.py: oracledb-based Oracle sandbox lifecycle (schema-level via CREATE USER, table cloning via CTAS, proc cloning via ALL_SOURCE, scenario execution with NLS date handling).

shared_python.description: Python library for DDL analysis. Modules: loader.py (DDL parsing facade), loader_data.py (data structures for parsed DDL entries), loader_io.py (DDL file I/O), loader_parse.py (control-flow-aware leaf parsing and reference extraction), block_segmenter.py (T-SQL control-flow block segmentation for IF/ELSE, WHILE, TRY/CATCH, BEGIN/END), tsql_utils.py (shared T-SQL masking helpers for routing scans and segmentation), discover.py (catalog-mandatory list/show/refs CLI), init.py (migration project scaffolding — SourceConfig registry, run_scaffold_project, run_scaffold_hooks, CLI), init_templates.py (per-technology template functions for CLAUDE.md, README, .envrc, repo-map, pre-commit hook), catalog.py (catalog JSON I/O, routing summary generation, snapshot_enriched_fields/restore_enriched_fields for re-extract field preservation), catalog_dmf.py (write_catalog_files orchestration), catalog_diff.py (diff-aware classification of catalog objects — hash comparison and unchanged/changed/new/removed classification), catalog_enrich.py (offline AST enrichment CLI — BFS call graph, SELECT INTO/TRUNCATE detection), ddl_hash.py (deterministic DDL hashing — whitespace-normalized SHA-256 for definitions and canonical JSON for table signals), setup_ddl.py (DDL setup orchestration with diff-aware reexport; includes headless extract subcommand), sqlserver_extract.py (direct pyodbc extraction for SQL Server — all 13 catalog signal queries, DMF reference queries via Python loop; called by run_extract), oracle_extract.py (direct oracledb extraction for Oracle — DBMS_METADATA DDL, ALL_TAB_COLUMNS, ALL_CONSTRAINTS, ALL_DEPENDENCIES; called by run_extract), migrate.py (migration context assembly + dbt artifact writer CLI), profile.py (profiling context assembly + write-back CLI), refactor.py (refactoring context assembly + catalog write-back CLI + symmetric diff logic), test_harness.py (sandbox lifecycle CLI — reads manifest, routes to technology-specific backend, includes compare-sql for equivalence audit), dry_run.py (CLI + run_dry_run orchestrator for /status plugin command), guards.py (all check_* guard functions, _STAGE_GUARDS registry, run_guards — imported by dry_run.py), dry_run_content.py (stage content collectors and detail/summary functions — imported by dry_run.py), env_config.py (git-repo assertion, project-root/dbt-path/ddl-dir/catalog-dir resolution with env-var overrides), dmf_processing.py (DMF row processing helpers), sql_types.py (SQL type mappings), name_resolver.py (FQN normalization).

shared_schemas.description: JSON Schema files for catalog objects, agent I/O, skill output, test harness output, discover CLI output, and shared definitions. See this directory for the current schema set.

ddl_mcp.description: MCP server for structured DDL parsing. server.py exposes list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body.

mssql_mcp.description: genai-toolbox config for live SQL Server queries. tools.yaml defines mssql-execute-sql tool.

migration_skills.description: Skill definitions: listing-objects/ (catalog browsing — list objects by type), analyzing-table/ (table scoping — writer discovery, procedure analysis via reference, statement resolution, catalog persistence), generating-model/ (dbt model generation from refactored SQL, staging + mart split), profiling-table/ (interactive single-table profiling with approval gates), generating-tests/ (single-table test generation with ground truth capture), reviewing-tests/ (LLM quality gate for test specs), reviewing-model/ (dbt model review with structured feedback, stable reference codes, and acknowledgements protocol; references/ contains style guidelines), refactoring-sql/ (CTE restructuring with equivalence audit), refactoring-view/ (SQL Server view → ephemeral dbt staging model with import/logical/final CTE structure).

migration_commands.description: Stage-specific commands: setup-ddl.md (DDL extraction from live SQL Server with catalog signals, DMF references, and AST enrichment; also enriches view catalogs with sql+columns fields), scope.md (writer discovery), profile.md (migration profiling), generate-model.md (dbt model generation), status.md (migration status dashboard — calls migrate-util dry-run CLI, interprets results with LLM), init-ad-migration.md (prerequisite checker and installer), init-dbt.md (dbt project scaffolding), setup-sandbox.md (create throwaway sandbox DB), teardown-sandbox.md (drop sandbox DB), generate-tests.md (multi-table test generation with review loop), refactor.md (SQL CTE restructuring with equivalence audit), refactor-view.md (SQL Server view → ephemeral dbt staging model; resolves dependency order, runs refactoring-view skill per view). Each is self-contained with sub-agent orchestration, worktree setup, and result summarization.

tests_migration.description: Python pytest suite: test_discover.py, test_catalog.py, test_catalog_enrich.py, test_catalog_diff.py, test_catalog_diff_integration.py, test_ddl_hash.py, test_extract_refs.py, test_setup_ddl.py, test_init.py, test_smoke.py, test_migrate.py, test_profile.py, test_env_config.py, test_test_harness.py, test_test_harness_oracle_integration.py, test_dry_run.py. Fixtures: ddl/, ddl_unparseable/, discover/flat/ (with catalog/ subdirectory), discover/unparseable/, catalog/ (table and procedure JSON fixtures), migrate/ (DDL, catalog with procedures/tables, dbt project fixture, manifest.json), profile/ (DDL, catalog with procedures/tables, manifest.json), test_harness/ (manifest.json for sandbox tests), dry_run/ (manifest, catalog, procedures, test-specs, dbt project with compiled artifacts), sql/ (Docker SQL Server setup scripts), fixtures/setup_ddl/oracle/ (ALL_OBJECTS fixture for SH/HR list-schemas tests plus full SH extraction fixtures: all_tab_columns.json, all_constraints_pk_uk.json, all_constraints_fk.json, identity_columns.json, object_types.json, dependencies_proc/view/func.json, proc_params.json, definitions.json, all_views.json — used by TestExtractOracleUnit).

tests_evals.description: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing against MigrationTest schema. Skill packages: profiling-table, generating-model, generating-tests, reviewing-tests, reviewing-model, analyzing-table, refactoring-sql. Command packages: cmd-scope, cmd-profile, cmd-generate-model, cmd-generate-tests, cmd-status, cmd-refactor. Live DB packages: oracle-live (extract+scope+profile against Docker Oracle), mssql-live (extract+scope+profile against Docker SQL Server). Regression packages: oracle-regression (per-command pipeline coverage against SH schema fixtures). Assertions use AJV schema validation via shared schema-helpers.js module. Top-level promptfooconfig.yaml for full-suite runs. Run via: cd tests/evals && npm run eval. See docs/design/eval-harness/README.md.

tests_ddl_mcp.description: Python pytest suite for the DDL MCP server. test_server.py tests all MCP tool handlers. fixtures/oracle/ contains Oracle SH-schema DDL fixtures (tables, procedures, views, manifest.json) for dialect-aware column type tests and live integration tests (@pytest.mark.oracle).

scripts.description: Developer scripts: setup-worktree.sh, publish-test-db-image.sh, restore-dw-samples.sh, build-dacpac-extract.sh, sql/ (test DB creation scripts and JSON fixtures).

docs.description: Documentation. Use docs/design/README.md as the index for design topics. reference/ contains operator and contributor docs, and requirements/ contains product requirements.

key_directories.plugin/: Unified Claude Code plugin with commands, skills, lib, and MCP servers
key_directories.plugin/lib/: Python DDL analysis library (uv project, sqlglot-based)
key_directories.plugin/lib/shared/schemas/: JSON Schema files for catalog, agent I/O, discover CLI output, and shared definitions
key_directories.tests/unit/: Python pytest tests for shared library (discover, catalog, catalog_enrich, extract_refs, integration)
key_directories.tests/evals/: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing (skill packages: profiling-table, generating-model, generating-tests, reviewing-tests, reviewing-model, analyzing-table; command packages: cmd-scope, cmd-profile, cmd-generate-model, cmd-generate-tests)
key_directories.plugin/mcp/ddl/tests/: Python pytest tests for the DDL MCP server. fixtures/oracle/ holds Oracle SH-schema DDL fixtures and manifest.
key_directories.docs/design/: Architecture decision records and design specs
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules such as coding-conventions, git-workflow, logging-policy, and codex-execution-policy
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for repo-local Claude Code skills

commands.test_migration_python_integration: cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest -m integration
commands.test_migration_python_oracle: cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest -m oracle
commands.test_harness_execute_spec: cd plugin/lib && uv run test-harness execute-spec --spec <path>
commands.test_harness_convert_dbt: cd plugin/lib && uv run test-harness convert-dbt --spec <json-path> --output <yml-path>
commands.migrate_util_dry_run: cd plugin/lib && uv run migrate-util dry-run <table> <stage> [--detail]
commands.migrate_util_guard: cd plugin/lib && uv run migrate-util guard <table> <stage>
commands.refactor_context: cd plugin/lib && uv run refactor context --table <schema.table>
commands.refactor_write: cd plugin/lib && uv run refactor write --table <schema.table> --refactored-sql-file <path> --status ok|partial|error
commands.compare_sql: cd plugin/lib && uv run test-harness compare-sql --sql-a-file <extracted.sql> --sql-b-file <refactored.sql> --spec <spec-path>

conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (git add <file>, not git add .).

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands.
notes_for_agents.plugin_loading: Load the ad-migration plugin with: claude --plugin-dir plugin/ CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT points to the plugin root (plugin/).
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant. Any directory of .sql files works.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover.py requires catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing. No AST fallback.
notes_for_agents.parse_errors: sqlglot parse failures are hard errors (DdlParseError). The loader does not silently skip unparseable DDL.
notes_for_agents.python_tests: Two pytest suites: (1) shared lib — cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest; SQL Server integration: uv run pytest -m integration; Oracle integration: uv run pytest -m oracle. (2) DDL MCP server — cd plugin/mcp/ddl && uv run pytest.
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever any entry here becomes stale, especially after architecture, entrypoint, command, module, package, test/eval layout, or documentation-index changes.
